creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #23)

But then whats the reason why they still exist for PHP 8.1 (e. g. https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/archivers/php81-phar/files/patch-config.m4 ) and PHP 8.2 (e. g. https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/mail/php82-imap/files/patch-config.m4 ) and have only been removed for PHP 8.0 and 8.3?
